---
title: "test_lightning_rod_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_lightning_rod_empire.py"
loc: 14
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.55
style_score: 3.58
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.23
---

## Intent
The `test_lightning_rod_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_optimize_file_signature, test_optimize_file_idempotent. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_optimize_file_signature, test_optimize_file_idempotent. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.lightning_rod](file://src.tools.lightning_rod)

### Exports
- `test_optimize_file_signature`
- `test_optimize_file_idempotent`
